name: Skillet Corn Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 450°F (232°C).
2. Grease a heavy 10-inch cast-iron skillet.
3. Sprinkle the stone-ground cornmeal on the bottom of the skillet, and place it in the oven.
4. In a large mixing bowl, combine the self-rising cornmeal and salt.
5. Make a well in the center, and whisk in the egg and buttermilk.
6. Pour the batter into the hot skillet.
7. Bake for 30 minutes.
8. Brown the top under the broiler for 1 minute.
9. Remove the cornbread from the oven, and turn it out of the skillet onto a wire rack to cool.
10. Cut into wedges and serve.
Makes 10 servings.
